analysis: The project is a website focused on black holes with a cosmic theme. The existing files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the website. The theme should be enhanced with black hole visuals, animations, and interactive elements. The CSS file needs to be completed with the full intended dark, cosmic theme, including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML file should be completed to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. The JavaScript file needs to be updated with the improved mobile menu toggle functionality and event listeners for the new buttons.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.

Update the JavaScript content to ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality, including the mobile menu toggle.
